did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a narrative review that synthesizes existing literature on the use of AI (deep learning, CNNs, U-Net) in melanoma diagnostics. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI methods itself, but rather discusses how other studies have used AI for tasks such as classification, feature extraction, and molecular prediction.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
